description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a driveway with a parked van, a double garage, and a landscaped garden with a row of small trees and flower beds. Large windows dominate the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The rear of the house includes a private, fenced garden with mature trees, a lawn, and a patio area for outdoor seating. The upper floor has a terrace with glass railings and additional outdoor living space. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with accents of stone and metal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, landscaped gardens, and a rear terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, landscaped garden, and a van parked outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper terrace, large side window, and the rear garden with mature trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio area, and a mix of mature trees and lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the continuation of the garden and terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, double garage doors, and a paved path flanked by landscaped greenery.
